differential_diagnoses: Acute exacerbation of chronic schistosomiasis with sepsis
next_steps: Send peripheral blood smear for thick and thin assessment to definitively rule out malaria
Request dengue serology (NS1 antigen and IgM/IgG antibodies)
Order Leptospira PCR and IgM testing
Perform full infectious workup including serial blood, urine, and stool cultures
Obtain ferritin, fasting triglycerides, fibrinogen, and soluble CD25 to evaluate for secondary HLH
Collect serial cardiac biomarkers (troponin, NT-proBNP) and evaluate for autoimmune or viral myocarditis markers
Order coagulation profile (PT, PTT, INR, fibrinogen) and D-dimer to monitor for DIC
Monitor serial lactate and bedside echocardiography to assess responsiveness to volume resuscitation and vasopressor titration
